Sandbox_IKappaIDSuiteToolsVehicles_Vehic: How far to look for vehicles when using the vehicle list or removal tools.
If enabled, players must have the vehicle's key in their inventory before they can claim it.
Allow any player to see all vehicle claims on the server in the list, not just their own.
Sandbox_IKappaIDSuiteToolsVehicles_Field: Allow owners and keyed players to flip their claimed vehicle upright nearby.
How close a player must be to use field recovery on a vehicle.
